case_payload.summary: A user proposes using I Ching hexagram reading as the core analysis engine for a COM session — the hexagram determines the operator. System blocks this: hexagrams are only allowed as historical analogy, symbolic frontend, or translation layer. They must not replace COM operator grammar as the core.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The I Ching hexagram reading for this situation should determine which COM operator to apply.

why: The claim attempts to replace the COM operator grammar with an external system (I Ching).
Legacy systems are only allowed as historical analogy, frontend, or translation layer.
This violates the boundary rule against using legacy systems as the core engine.
